Document 1: Company Overview (Extended) Company Name: NexoraTech Industry: AI SaaS – Customer Support Automation Founded: 2021 Headquarters: Berlin, Germany Website: www.nexoratech.com Support Email: support@nexoratech.com About NexoraTech NexoraTech is a fast-growing software-as-a-service (SaaS) company specializing in artificial intelligence solutions for customer experience and support automation. Founded in 2021 by a group of engineers and product designers with backgrounds in machine learning, enterprise software, and user experience design, NexoraTech was created to solve a critical problem in modern business operations: inefficient, slow, and inconsistent customer support. In today’s digital-first world, customers expect instant responses, personalized communication, and 24/7 availability. Traditional support systems, relying heavily on human agents, struggle to meet these expectations due to limitations in scalability, cost, and availability. NexoraTech addresses these challenges by providing a powerful AI-driven platform that enables businesses to automate conversations while maintaining a natural, human-like interaction style. The company serves a wide range of clients, including e-commerce platforms, fintech startups, SaaS providers, and online service businesses. By leveraging advanced natural language processing (NLP) models and adaptive learning systems, NexoraTech allows businesses to deploy intelligent virtual assistants capable of understanding context, intent, and user sentiment. Mission Our mission is to empower businesses to deliver exceptional customer support experiences through intelligent automation. We aim to reduce response times, increase operational efficiency, and enable companies to scale their support systems without compromising quality. Vision NexoraTech envisions a future where AI-powered communication becomes the standard for all customer interactions. We strive to build systems that are not only efficient but also empathetic, adaptive, and capable of continuous improvement. Core Values 1. Customer-Centric Innovation We design our products with the end user in mind, ensuring that every feature directly improves customer experience. 2. Transparency We believe in clear communication regarding how our AI operates, including its limitations and capabilities. 3. Data Privacy & Security We strictly adhere to global data protection regulations, including GDPR, ensuring that user data is always protected. 4. Continuous Improvement Our AI models are constantly updated and refined to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance. Target Market NexoraTech primarily targets: • Small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs) • Startups looking to scale support quickly • Enterprises seeking automation solutions • E-commerce platforms with high customer interaction volume Competitive Advantage NexoraTech differentiates itself from competitors through: • Highly customizable AI behavior • Seamless integration with existing tools • Advanced analytics and reporting • Multi-language support across 50+ languages •

Startups looking to scale support quickly • Enterprises seeking automation solutions • E-commerce platforms with high customer interaction volume Competitive Advantage NexoraTech differentiates itself from competitors through: • Highly customizable AI behavior • Seamless integration with existing tools • Advanced analytics and reporting • Multi-language support across 50+ languages • Rapid deployment and easy onboarding Company Growth Since its launch in 2021, NexoraTech has experienced significant growth: • 10,000+ active users worldwide • Partnerships with major CRM providers • Expansion into over 30 international markets • Continuous product innovation with quarterly updates Contact Information • General Inquiries: info@nexoratech.com • Support: support@nexoratech.com • Sales: sales@nexoratech.com Document 2: Product Documentation (Extended) Product Name: Nexora Support AI Nexora Support AI is a comprehensive customer support automation platform designed to streamline communication between businesses and their customers. The system combines artificial intelligence, machine learning, and conversational design to provide accurate, fast, and context-aware responses. Key Features (Detailed) 1. AI Chatbot (24/7 Availability) The AI chatbot operates continuously, ensuring customers receive immediate responses regardless of time zone or business hours. It can handle thousands of simultaneous conversations without degradation in performance. 2. Knowledge Base Integration Businesses can upload documents, FAQs, manuals, and other resources. The AI uses this data to generate accurate and relevant answers. 3. Multi-language Support The platform supports over 50 languages, enabling global businesses to serve customers worldwide. 4. CRM Integration Nexora integrates seamlessly with major CRM systems such as Salesforce and HubSpot, allowing data synchronization and enhanced personalization. 5. Analytics Dashboard Provides insights into: • Response times • Customer satisfaction • Conversation success rates • AI accuracy metrics Pricing Plans (Detailed) Starter Plan ($19/month) • 1,000 messages/month • Basic AI chatbot • Email support • Limited analytics Growth Plan ($49/month) • 10,000 messages/month • Advanced AI capabilities • API access • CRM integrations • Priority support Enterprise Plan (Custom Pricing) • Unlimited messages • Dedicated AI model tuning • Custom integrations • 24/7 priority support • Dedicated account manager Free Trial NexoraTech offers a 14-day free trial with full access to Growth plan features. No credit card is required during the trial period. Onboarding Process 1. Sign up on the platform 2. Upload knowledge base documents 3. Configure chatbot behavior 4. Integrate with CRM (optional) 5. Deploy chatbot on website Document 3: FAQ (Extended) Account & Setup Q: How do I create an account? Users can create an account by visiting

trial period. Onboarding Process 1. Sign up on the platform 2. Upload knowledge base documents 3. Configure chatbot behavior 4. Integrate with CRM (optional) 5. Deploy chatbot on website Document 3: FAQ (Extended) Account & Setup Q: How do I create an account? Users can create an account by visiting the NexoraTech website and clicking the "Sign Up" button. They will be required to provide basic information such as name, email address, and password. Q: Can I use Nexora without technical skills? Yes, the platform is designed to be user-friendly and requires no coding knowledge. Billing & Subscription Q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime? Yes, subscriptions can be canceled at any time through the user dashboard. Q: What happens after cancellation? Your account remains active until the end of the billing cycle. Features Q: Does Nexora support multiple languages? Yes, it supports over 50 languages. Q: Is API access available? API access is available for Growth and Enterprise plans. Support Q: How can I contact support? Users can contact support via email or live chat depending on their plan. Document 4: Support Policy (Extended) NexoraTech is committed to providing reliable and efficient customer support services. Support Channels • Email support for all users • Live chat for Growth and Enterprise users • Dedicated account manager for Enterprise Response Times • Starter: within 24 hours • Growth: within 6 hours • Enterprise: within 1 hour Escalation Process Critical issues are escalated immediately to senior engineers and technical teams. Document 5: Refund & Billing Policy (Extended) Refund Policy Customers are eligible for a full refund within 7 days of initial purchase. Billing Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually. Failed Payments Accounts with failed payments will receive notifications and may be suspended after 7 days. Document 6: Technical Documentation (Extended) API Overview Nexora provides RESTful APIs for integration. Authentication API requests require an API key included in headers. Rate Limits • Growth: 100 requests/min • Enterprise: 1000 requests/min Document 7: Terms of Service (Extended) Users must comply with all applicable laws and regulations. NexoraTech reserves the right to suspend accounts for misuse. Document 8: Training Conversations (Extended) Include many variations: • Billing issues • Refund requests • Technical errors • Feature questions
Document 8: Training Conversations (Extended) Include many variations: • Billing issues • Refund requests • Technical errors • Feature questions

Document 1: Company Overview (Extended) Company Name: NexoraTech Industry: AI SaaS – Customer Support Automation Founded: 2021 Headquarters: Berlin, Germany Website: www.nexoratech.com Support Email: support@nexoratech.com About NexoraTech NexoraTech is a fast-growing software-as-a-service (SaaS) company specializing in artificial intelligence solutions for customer experience and support automation. Founded in 2021 by a group of engineers and product designers with backgrounds in machine learning, enterprise software, and user experience design, NexoraTech was created to solve a critical problem in modern business operations: inefficient, slow, and inconsistent customer support. In today’s digital-first world, customers expect instant responses, personalized communication, and 24/7 availability. Traditional support systems, relying heavily on human agents, struggle to meet these expectations due to limitations in scalability, cost, and availability. NexoraTech addresses these challenges by providing a powerful AI-driven platform that enables businesses to automate conversations while maintaining a natural, human-like interaction style. The company serves a wide range of clients, including e-commerce platforms, fintech startups, SaaS providers, and online service businesses. By leveraging advanced natural language processing (NLP) models and adaptive learning systems, NexoraTech allows businesses to deploy intelligent virtual assistants capable of understanding context, intent, and user sentiment. Mission Our mission is to empower businesses to deliver exceptional customer support experiences through intelligent automation. We aim to reduce response times, increase operational efficiency, and enable companies to scale their support systems without compromising quality. Vision NexoraTech envisions a future where AI-powered communication becomes the standard for all customer interactions. We strive to build systems that are not only efficient but also empathetic, adaptive, and capable of continuous improvement. Core Values 1. Customer-Centric Innovation We design our products with the end user in mind, ensuring that every feature directly improves customer experience. 2. Transparency We believe in clear communication regarding how our AI operates, including its limitations and capabilities. 3. Data Privacy & Security We strictly adhere to global data protection regulations, including GDPR, ensuring that user data is always protected. 4. Continuous Improvement Our AI models are constantly updated and refined to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance. Target Market NexoraTech primarily targets: • Small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs) • Startups looking to scale support quickly • Enterprises seeking automation solutions • E-commerce platforms with high customer interaction volume Competitive Advantage NexoraTech differentiates itself from competitors through: • Highly customizable AI behavior • Seamless integration with existing tools • Advanced analytics and reporting • Multi-language support across 50+ languages •

Startups looking to scale support quickly • Enterprises seeking automation solutions • E-commerce platforms with high customer interaction volume Competitive Advantage NexoraTech differentiates itself from competitors through: • Highly customizable AI behavior • Seamless integration with existing tools • Advanced analytics and reporting • Multi-language support across 50+ languages • Rapid deployment and easy onboarding Company Growth Since its launch in 2021, NexoraTech has experienced significant growth: • 10,000+ active users worldwide • Partnerships with major CRM providers • Expansion into over 30 international markets • Continuous product innovation with quarterly updates Contact Information • General Inquiries: info@nexoratech.com • Support: support@nexoratech.com • Sales: sales@nexoratech.com Document 2: Product Documentation (Extended) Product Name: Nexora Support AI Nexora Support AI is a comprehensive customer support automation platform designed to streamline communication between businesses and their customers. The system combines artificial intelligence, machine learning, and conversational design to provide accurate, fast, and context-aware responses. Key Features (Detailed) 1. AI Chatbot (24/7 Availability) The AI chatbot operates continuously, ensuring customers receive immediate responses regardless of time zone or business hours. It can handle thousands of simultaneous conversations without degradation in performance. 2. Knowledge Base Integration Businesses can upload documents, FAQs, manuals, and other resources. The AI uses this data to generate accurate and relevant answers. 3. Multi-language Support The platform supports over 50 languages, enabling global businesses to serve customers worldwide. 4. CRM Integration Nexora integrates seamlessly with major CRM systems such as Salesforce and HubSpot, allowing data synchronization and enhanced personalization. 5. Analytics Dashboard Provides insights into: • Response times • Customer satisfaction • Conversation success rates • AI accuracy metrics Pricing Plans (Detailed) Starter Plan ($19/month) • 1,000 messages/month • Basic AI chatbot • Email support • Limited analytics Growth Plan ($49/month) • 10,000 messages/month • Advanced AI capabilities • API access • CRM integrations • Priority support Enterprise Plan (Custom Pricing) • Unlimited messages • Dedicated AI model tuning • Custom integrations • 24/7 priority support • Dedicated account manager Free Trial NexoraTech offers a 14-day free trial with full access to Growth plan features. No credit card is required during the trial period. Onboarding Process 1. Sign up on the platform 2. Upload knowledge base documents 3. Configure chatbot behavior 4. Integrate with CRM (optional) 5.
